Done. Crundle's response was generated and posted to Discord. The response:

> Oakland has good dark places. Crundle has heard. Many tunnel under city, many shadow in warehouse district.
> 
> Ceiling problem though. Sky is ceiling there. Too high. Wrong feeling.
> 
> But is fine city for one who stay underground mostly. Crundle could manage.
